_scene_summary: Corporate-meeting ambush. Crew arrives at the rendezvous to find hired guns waiting. Mid-range cover-to-cover firefight in an urban/industrial setting.
_tier1_bg_source: 5 Parsecs Core Rulebook/Art/png/General Art/Nov_16_Meeting.png OR composite of Meeting.png + Ambush.png

_tier2_planned_actors.intent: first hired gun behind left cover
heavy weapon (Rattle Gun) on right flank

_animation_hints: FX modulate pulse on muzzle_flash for periodic firefight feel
Optional: Ken Burns slow zoom toward leader silhouette
_ambient_motion_doc: Subtle 'living painting' motion (SceneStage). Per-layer drift is screen-space px on a slow sine; foreground drifts more than the backdrop for a tiny parallax. breathe is a slow Ken Burns scale swing layered on overscan; overscan zooms every layer a hair so drift never exposes the letterbox edge. Periods are full-cycle seconds (long = calm). Gated by Reduced Motion (ThemeManager). enabled:false stops all motion. Tune the numbers here, no code.
_character_slots_doc: Crew composited at runtime. 'hero' <- captain; other slots <- AdvisorSystem role match. anchor = feet (bottom-center) normalized to the stage; scale = figure height as a fraction of stage height; z orders WITHIN the slot group (higher = drawn on top). The whole slot group renders behind the baked ambush enemies by tree order.
